children.characters: 先把问题说清楚，再抽牌。好的解读不是替你决定，而是把选择背后的代价、机会和盲点照亮。

children.characters: 你不是单纯想离开，而是在寻找更有生命力的工作状态。现在最大的阻力不是能力，而是害怕承认自己已经不满足。新机会值得认真推进，但不要用情绪性离职来证明决心。

Inter, "PingFang SC", "HarmonyOS Sans", "Microsoft YaHei", system-ui, sans-serif

children.characters: 先向新机会确认职责边界、成长空间和试用期标准。
children.fontFamily: Inter, "PingFang SC", "HarmonyOS Sans", "Microsoft YaHei", system-ui, sans-serif
Inter, "PingFang SC", "HarmonyOS Sans", "Microsoft YaHei", system-ui, sans-serif

children.characters: 给当前岗位设一个两周观察期，只看是否仍有可谈判的改变。
children.fontFamily: Inter, "PingFang SC", "HarmonyOS Sans", "Microsoft YaHei", system-ui, sans-serif
Inter, "PingFang SC", "HarmonyOS Sans", "Microsoft YaHei", system-ui, sans-serif

children.characters: 如果两个条件都成立：新机会更清晰，现岗位无实质变化，就选择前进。
children.fontFamily: Inter, "PingFang SC", "HarmonyOS Sans", "Microsoft YaHei", system-ui, sans-serif
Inter, "PingFang SC", "HarmonyOS Sans", "Microsoft YaHei", system-ui, sans-serif

children.characters: 不需要完美的答案，写下最先浮现在心里的那个念头就好。
